description.zh: 以新儒学为治国理念的朝鲜王朝，世宗大王推动文化繁荣，两班士大夫阶层通过科举入仕，司谏院和司宪府构成独特的言谏制度，《经国大典》为根本法典。
description.en: Neo-Confucian dynasty featuring Sejong the Great's cultural renaissance, yangban scholar-officials selected through gwageo examinations, a unique system of remonstrance through the Saganwon and Saheonbu, and the Gyeongguk Daejeon legal code.
